goal: Promote the repeated CircleCI credential-recovery steering into Project Brain CI rules so future JSC-363 CI triage uses ~/.codex/.env before classifying CircleCI API or log access as unavailable.

feedbackSignal.summary: The operator repeatedly reminded Codex that CircleCI API/log triage should use ~/.codex/.env, including the current instruction to remember this for the CircleCI plugin.
feedbackSignal.source: current operator steering plus .harness/memory/LEARNINGS.md:48 and goal-board CircleCI credential policy receipts

rootOperationalFailure: Project Brain CI rules had zero promoted rules even though repo memory, AGENTS.md, goal receipts, and repeated operator steering already identified env-backed CircleCI recovery as a recurring workflow invariant.

durableImprovement.behavior: Future CircleCI triage must probe that ~/.codex/.env is a regular readable file before sourcing it for token-backed API or log access, and must record FIFO, no-writer, or unreadable-surface blockers separately from missing credentials.

nonGoals: Do not print, copy, persist, or validate secret values from ~/.codex/.env.
Do not call CircleCI API unless a CircleCI lane is failing or opaque.
Do not claim CI green, merge readiness, Linear alignment, Judge/PM readiness, or goal completion from this memory-rule slice.
Do not mutate Linear from this slice; read-only Linear refresh is recorded as tracker evidence only.

ecosystemReviewFindings: Recovery is a first-class runtime class
Repeatable telemetry is the learning loop
rollbackPlan: Revert the PU-045 commit. The existing AGENTS.md and .harness/memory/LEARNINGS.md env-backed validation rules would remain active, but Project Brain CI retrieval would lose the promoted rule.
acceptanceCriteria: Project Brain CI rules contain a must-level rule for ~/.codex/.env-backed CircleCI API/log recovery.
The rule requires a regular-file probe before sourcing ~/.codex/.env and distinguishes missing credentials from an unreadable FIFO or missing writer.
The rule forbids printing or persisting secret values.
The goal receipt records that live PR #327 through PR #329 CircleCI lanes were already green through GitHub, so CircleCI API access was not needed in this slice.
Linear JSC-363 is refreshed as tracker truth only and remains separate from implementation, CI, review, merge, and Judge/PM proof.
circleciCredentialPolicy: Use ~/.codex/.env for CircleCI API/log triage only when CircleCI evidence is failing or opaque; never print values; if the surface is a FIFO without a writer, classify that as env_surface_unreadable rather than missing credentials.
